disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lesions arise from long-standing blackheads/whiteheads and oily skin
trigger_question_examples: Has the patient had ongoing spots and oily skin before this?
Do the sore spots come from existing pimples?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, there's always been oily skin and spots — the picking has made them raw.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever and no honey-coloured crusting on the sores
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, or golden/honey-coloured crusts on the sores?
Is the skin around the sores hot and spreading?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever — it was 37.1. The sores are raw from scratching but no golden crusts.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't know, it just looks sore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous scratching/picking of the itchy spots is the main driver of the bleeding
trigger_question_examples: What is making the spots bleed?
Is the patient scratching or picking them?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep scratching because it itches so much and then they bleed.
